body:
## Why

A pass over the launch surface from all angles: make the public site **honest and launch-safe**, add the missing **custom-AI request** path, and turn the **official go-live gate from FAIL → PASS**. Everything stays inside the 11 non-negotiables (no scraping, no auto-send, no fabricated claims).

## 🔴 Doctrine fix (most important)
The public homepage shipped **fabricated social proof** that contradicted Dealix's own `no_overclaim.yaml` and is a real legal/reputation risk for a trust-and-compliance brand:
- Fake client logos (نماء، رؤية، واحة…)
- Invented metrics (**+500 clients, 3.2x growth, 99.9% uptime**)
- Fake testimonials with invented names + outcome quotes ("18% revenue leakage")

Replaced with honest, conversion-oriented content:
- **"Built for Saudi B2B sectors"** strip (real ICP, not customer logos)
- **Verifiable governance facts** (5 tiers · L0–L5 evidence · 100% bilingual · 0 external sends without approval)
- **Operating-principle cards** (approval-first · evidence-not-promises · PDPL-native)
- An honest **founding-customer band** ("be among the first results we document — with your consent")
- Softened a "24/7 support" overclaim → "direct founder support"

## 🟢 New capability — `/contact` (Talk to us / Request custom AI)
- New `frontend/src/app/[locale]/contact/page.tsx` + `ContactForm.tsx`.
- Bilingual intake for **Custom AI build / Managed Ops / Diagnostic / Partnership**.
- Posts **consented inbound leads** to the founder inbox via the existing public `demo-request` endpoint and returns the Calendly booking link → a real inbound lead funnel.
- Fixes previously **dead links** (`/offer/retainer`, `/contact`) referenced by pricing + footer.

## 🟢 Official go-live gate: FAIL → PASS
`scripts/verify_dealix_commercial_go_live.sh` was failing on two real blockers:
1. **Time-bomb test** — `scope_requested_within_days` pinned `now()`; the test hard-coded an event date and broke as time passed. Function now accepts an injectable `today`; the test pins a reference date (mirrors the sibling `count_evidence_events` API).
2. **Missing `frontend/.env.local.example`** — required by the FE/BE contract check. Added a documented bilingual env example + a `.gitignore` allow-rule.

Result:
```
COMPANY_READY_VERDICT: PASS
COMMERCIAL_LAUNCH_READY: PASS
FOUNDER_OPERATING_SYSTEM_VERDICT=PASS
DEALIX_OFFICIAL_LAUNCH_VERDICT=PASS
```

## 📋 Docs
- `docs/ops/DEALIX_LAUNCH_EXECUTION_AR.md` — single source of truth: honest launch status, root obstacles + resolutions, 30/60/90 map, and **exact founder-gated next actions** (warm list, Railway deploy, domain, Moyasar live).
- `docs/commercial/launch_kit/` — bilingual launch content **drafts** (5 LinkedIn posts, founding-customer email, 2 WhatsApp warm-intros, founding-offer one-pager). All marked *DRAFT — founder approval required* with the bilingual value disclaimer.

## ✅ Verification
- `cd frontend && npm run build` → green (all routes, incl. new `/contact`)
- `python3 -c "import api.main"` → 944 routes
- `python3 scripts/dealix_founder_daily_brief.py` → today's brief renders (0 paid customers — honest)
- `python3 scripts/warm_list_outreach.py --csv data/warm_list.csv.template` → generates qualified, doctrine-compliant drafts
- `bash scripts/verify_dealix_commercial_go_live.sh` → `DEALIX_OFFICIAL_LAUNCH_VERDICT=PASS`

## What this PR intentionally does NOT do (founder-gated)
Deploy to live Railway, connect `dealix.me`, flip Moyasar live, send any outreach, or invent leads/customers. Those require the founder's credentials/network and are documented step-by-step in the launch report.

---
_Estimated value is not Verified value / القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة_

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_012vEMK5XSWFUQnkM128tYiA)_

commits.messageBody:
…al gate

Public site (doctrine fix):
- Remove fabricated social proof from the homepage — fake client logos,
  invented stats (+500 clients, 3.2x, 99.9%), and fake testimonials —
  which violated the no-overclaim doctrine on the live marketing surface.
  Replace with an honest "built for Saudi B2B sectors" strip, verifiable
  governance facts, operating-principle cards, and a founding-customer band.
- Soften a "24/7 support" overclaim to "direct founder support".

New capability:
- Add /contact "Talk to us / Request custom AI" page + ContactForm that
  posts consented inbound leads to the founder inbox (public demo-request)
  and returns the booking link. Fixes dead pricing/footer links.

Official go-live gate (FAIL -> PASS):
- Fix a time-bomb test: scope_requested_within_days accepts an injectable
  `today` (test pins a reference date).
- Add frontend/.env.local.example (FE/BE contract gate requirement) +
  gitignore allow-rule.

Docs:
- docs/ops/DEALIX_LAUNCH_EXECUTION_AR.md — launch status, root obstacles,
  and exact founder-gated next actions (warm list, deploy, domain, payments).
- docs/commercial/launch_kit/ — bilingual launch content drafts
  (LinkedIn, email, WhatsApp warm-intro, founding offer), approval-required.

Verified: frontend npm run build green; api.main imports (944 routes);
DEALIX_OFFICIAL_LAUNCH_VERDICT=PASS.

commits.messageBody:
…eaks

Both checks were failing pre-existing (independent of this PR's content):

- Trivy: aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0 no longer resolves ("unable to
  find version 0.24.0"), failing at the action-prepare stage. Switch to
  @master to match docker-build.yml's existing trivy-action usage.
- Gitleaks: gitleaks-action@v2 requires a paid GITLEAKS_LICENSE for
  organization repos. Replace with the open-source gitleaks CLI (official
  ghcr.io image) using the repo's .gitleaks.toml — same scan, no license.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012vEMK5XSWFUQnkM128tYiA
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): unblock repository-hardening — Trivy pin + license-free Gitl…

commits.messageBody:
…er-approved)

Both repository-hardening gates were dormant (broken) before this PR; once
un-broken they surfaced pre-existing FALSE POSITIVES unrelated to PR content
(a targeted scan found no real secrets). Founder explicitly approved scoping:

- Gitleaks: scan only the PR's commit range on pull_request events (standard
  PR-gate behavior); full-tree scan still runs on push/schedule. Secret
  scanning stays active — no real secret would be missed.
- Trivy: vulnerability scanning only (scanners: vuln). Secret scanning is
  owned by Gitleaks; Trivy's secret scanner false-positived on the grep
  patterns inside our own scripts/v*_verify.sh secret-check scripts.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012vEMK5XSWFUQnkM128tYiA
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): scope security scans to pre-existing-FP-free coverage (found…

commits.messageBody:
…GH CVEs)

Trivy fs scan (vuln-only) flagged next@15.1.3 in apps/web and frontend
with 10 fixed CVEs each, incl. CVE-2025-55182 (RSC pre-auth RCE) and
CVE-2025-29927 (middleware authorization bypass). Both apps are
production-bound (Railway frontend deploy), so suppression is not an option.

Bump next + eslint-config-next to 15.5.16 -- the minimal patch in the 15.x
line that clears every flagged CVE (binding constraint: CVE-2026-44573/
44578/44579, fixed at 15.5.16). React stays at 19; same major version,
low regression risk. Lockfiles regenerated via npm --package-lock-only.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012vEMK5XSWFUQnkM128tYiA

…e advisories)

15.5.16 still tripped two HIGH advisories that postdate the prior bump:
- CVE-2026-45109: info disclosure via middleware security-fix bypass (Turbopack)
- GHSA-26hh-7cqf-hhc6: App Router middleware/proxy bypass via segment-prefetch
  (incomplete-fix follow-up to CVE-2026-44575)

Both are patched at 15.5.18. Move to 15.5.19 -- the official `backport`
dist-tag (latest 15.5.x security line) -- to clear Trivy + Dependency Review
while staying on the 15.x major (no 16.x breaking-change risk pre-launch).

https://claude.ai/code/session_012vEMK5XSWFUQnkM128tYiA

title: Launch-safe website, custom-AI intake, and green official go-live gate
